description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: unit-test and complete. The unit-test job runs on multiple Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, caches PIP packages, installs dependencies, installs the package itself, runs tests with coverage, and uploads coverage data to Coveralls.io. The complete job finalizes the Coveralls report and runs only for a specific repository.
